title: Konjam Nilavu Chandhralekha Lyrics Thiruda Thiruda
stanzas:

Konjam Nilavu Chandhralekha Lyrics Thiruda Thiruda

Konjam nilavu
konjam neruppu
ondraai serthaal
endhan dhegam.

konjam nanju
konjam amudham
ondraaga serthaal
en kangal

konjam mirugam
konjam kadavul
ondraai serthaal
endhan nenjam..

Chandralekha aaahh...

konjam neruppu
ondraaga serthaal
endhan dhegam.

en kanavil evano avan

vaan mazhaipol
neeril vizhuvaan.
thinam naan nirkkum
varaiyil pozhivaan

en idhazhai
ival thandhu maayaathu
ini paar kadalil
alai endrum oyaathu.

vandhu naan mannile
yaen pirandhen
endra kaelvi vaaraadhu.
ingu nee irundhaal
oru tholvi neraadhu.

mangai un kaal pattaal
mannum oru mannalla
vellai pon dhegathil
vaervai thuli uppalla

sendhaazham poovukku
mullondurm kurai alla.
mullondru vaithaalum
pon meedhu thiraialla

konjam neruppu
ondraai serthaal
endhan dhegam.

konjam nanju

en kangal

endhan nenjam..

pirai yaeri varuvaane
vinkonda meenellaam
vizhaiyaada tharuvaane.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Konjam Nilavu Chandhralekha?

The song explores themes of romance and desire, blending soothing melodies with poetic lyrics.

Who composed the music for Thiruda Thiruda?

The music for Thiruda Thiruda was composed by A.R. Rahman.

What is the release year of the movie Thiruda Thiruda?

The movie Thiruda Thiruda was released in 1993.

Who are the singers of Konjam Nilavu Chandhralekha?

The song is sung by Anupama and Suresh Peters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Konjam Nilavu Chandhralekha is a captivating song from the movie Thiruda Thiruda, composed by A.R. Rahman. The song beautifully intertwines elements of romance and mystery, creating a soothing yet intriguing atmosphere. The lyrics convey a sense of longing and desire, enhanced by the soulful voices of Anupama and Suresh Peters. This classic melody evokes emotions of love and introspection, making it perfect for relaxation and night drives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Konjam Nilavu Chandhralekha from the movie Thiruda Thiruda is a mesmerizing blend of romance and mystery. Composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman, this song beautifully captures the essence of longing and desire. The unique combination of Anupama and Suresh Peters' vocals adds an enchanting layer to this classic melody.
stanzaMeanings: A little moonlight, a little fire, when combined, is like my body.
A little poison, a little nectar, when combined, is like my eyes.
A little animal, a little god, when combined, is like my heart.
Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh...
A little moonlight, a little fire, when combined, is like my body.
In my dream, someone appears as light in my night, falls like rain from the sky, and stays until I wake up.
She gave me her lips, it's magical. Now, the waves in the sea never stop.
The question of why I was born on this earth doesn't come. If you are here, there is no defeat.
Girl, if your feet touch the ground, it's not just soil. On your white body, sweat is not just salt.
For the red flower, having a thorn is not a flaw. Even with a thorn, it doesn't affect the gold.
A little moonlight, a little fire, when combined, is like my body.
A little poison, a little nectar, when combined, is like my eyes.
A little animal, a little god, when combined, is like my heart.
Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh...
Girl, with your eyes, the crescent moon will rise. The fish in the sky will dance.
A little moonlight, a little fire, when combined, is like my body.
A little poison, a little nectar, when combined, is like my eyes.
A little animal, a little god, when combined, is like my heart.
Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh... Chandralekha aaahh...
